title: helichrysum excisum
intro: Helichrysum excisum, also known as the yellow mountain daisy, is a flowering plant species within the sunflower family, Asteraceae. This plant is renowned for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene compounds. The health benefits of Helichrysum excisum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum excisum can be found in the form of essential oils, capsules, and teas, which are often used in aromatherapy, skincare, and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
